---
name: Connector Request
about: Request a new connector for a platform or service
title: "[Connector] "
labels: connector, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Platform / Service

Name and brief description of the platform or service to connect to.

## Use Case

Describe how this connector would be used within Data Workers.

## API Documentation Link

Provide a link to the platform's API docs (if available).

## Priority

How critical is this connector for your workflow?

- [ ] Critical — blocks production use
- [ ] High — needed soon
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — future consideration
